query: SELECT id, nomeCompleto, cpfCnpj FROM clientes WHERE LOWER(nomeCompleto) LIKE '%vanderson%' OR LOWER(nomeCompleto) LIKE '%natalicio%' OR LOWER(nomeCompleto) LIKE '%maria julia%' OR LOWER(nomeCompleto) LIKE '%osmair%' OR LOWER(nomeCompleto) LIKE '%irene%' OR LOWER(nomeCompleto) LIKE '%teonila%' OR LOWER(nomeCompleto) LIKE '%maeve%' OR LOWER(nomeCompleto) LIKE '%ariel%' ORDER BY nomeCompleto;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Xc9RJjwPAzqyUN.e36368bedae0 --database 4imSnKhwnzycXmSWcGeMqe --execute SELECT id, nomeCompleto, cpfCnpj FROM clientes WHERE LOWER(nomeCompleto) LIKE '%vanderson%' OR LOWER(nomeCompleto) LIKE '%natalicio%' OR LOWER(nomeCompleto) LIKE '%maria julia%' OR LOWER(nomeCompleto) LIKE '%osmair%' OR LOWER(nomeCompleto) LIKE '%irene%' OR LOWER(nomeCompleto) LIKE '%teonila%' OR LOWER(nomeCompleto) LIKE '%maeve%' OR LOWER(nomeCompleto) LIKE '%ariel%' ORDER BY nomeCompleto;
